meander_cell_w.desc: meander cell period along meander axis

meander_cell_h.desc: meander frame inner height (outer-bar to inner-bar gap)

meander_gap_s.desc: meander centered gap in outer bar / rail

meander_N.desc: meander number of cells (drives repeat transform)

dyb2_og.desc: CPW covered-open end gap (center strip end to cover bar)

dyb2_jx.desc: junction center x (move the whole balun)

dyb2_cw.desc: CPW center width (all 3 CPW arms) — tune for 50 Ω

dyb2_pw.desc: CPS strip width — tune for 50 Ω

dyb2_Lin.desc: CPW input arm length (from the node flat)

dyb2_pin.desc: CPS port inset from the strip outer end

components.label: DYB2 junction node V2 (CPW flats = cw, strips merge flush)
